name: vibemusic
description: vibeMusic 全栈音乐项目 - 工作区根配置

scripts.dev: concurrently -n musicapi,web -c cyan,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.deploy:web: npm run build && npm run nginx:reload
scripts.docker:dev: docker-compose up -d mysql redis rustfs nginx
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run docker:up
scripts.install:all: cd musicapi && npm install && cd ../vibemusic-web && npm install
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
